content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be restructured to treat agent embodiment itself as a dynamic, queryable memory module, where the agent’s physical or interactive context acts as an active learning sample that the memory system prioritizes for retention rather than just storing symbolic observations. This flips the standard framing where memory is a separate subsystem attached to an agent, turning the agent’s own being into the active learning memory store.
